Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to create transitions for each activity Then parallel DA and ACI Then loop BNC optional D and R repeated until stable After loop ends exclusive choice between CD and MD After that QA and SA in partial order concurrent but both before GLA GLA after QA and SA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These two tasks DA and ACI have no ordering constraints between them but both must be after cs setup so edges from cs setup to each and from each to loop node

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Edges sr verify to cs setup cs setup to da alloc cs setup to aci init da alloc to loop node aci init to loop node loop node to choice node choice node to qa test and sa audit qa test to gla approval sa audit to gla approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We might also need silent transitions for grouping Not necessary unless we want to group nodes into sub POWls

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also ensure that after contract setup both DA and ACI start concurrently that is fine because no edge between them Also ensure that after contract setup they must finish before entering loop node so edges from each to loop node ensures that Also ensure that after the exclusive choice is done either cd or md then QA and SA start concurrently so edges from choice node to qa test and sa audit ensures they wait for deployment completion

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The operator node itself is a POWL model containing its children but when used as a child of another POWl it acts as a single node in the parent ordering graph So our root will have these operator nodes as children along with other transitions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: following described scenario exactly including loops choices and ordering constraints
